sprintStatus.goal: Browser governance + irreversible action detection + P1 telemetry bug

issues.title: bug(telemetry): default fallback URL unreachable — events silently dropped
issues.note: NEW THIS CYCLE. Filed 2026-03-30 by telemetry E2E gate agent. Fix is one-line URL update in apps/cli/src/commands/claude-hook.ts. Change 'https://telemetry.agentguard.dev' to 'https://agentguard-cloud-api-server.vercel.app'. Affects all new users without .env override.

issues.title: feat: browser governance invariants — scope, state, and pacing for browser agents
issues.note: 3rd cycle in design phase. Open questions remain in issue but should not block a prototype. Recommended starting point: add browser.* action types to packages/core/src/actions.ts, stub invariant definitions in packages/invariants/src/definitions.ts. Design-then-implement, not design-forever.

issues.title: feat: irreversible action detection — human confirmation gates
issues.note: 3rd cycle in design phase. Infrastructure exists: PauseRequested/PauseResolved in packages/events/src/schema.ts, blast radius foundation in packages/kernel/src/blast-radius.ts. Recommended starting point: add irreversible property to ActionContext in packages/core/src/types.ts, hook detection in packages/kernel/src/decision.ts.

kernelPRsMergedThisCycle.title: fix(deps): patch path-to-regexp and brace-expansion Dependabot alerts (#1449)
kernelPRsMergedThisCycle.note: Was listed as 'open' in prior state.json. Confirmed merged via GitHub API this cycle. Closes #1449.

prQueue.note: 0 open PRs. PR budget 0/3. Squad is underutilizing capacity — senior coder should file PR for #1477 this cycle.

blockers.title: [dogfood] no-governance-self-modification blocks EM squad state writes to .agentguard/squads/
blockers.recommendation: Director attention needed. Fix: narrow OPERATIONAL_STATE_PATTERNS in packages/invariants/src/definitions.ts to exclude .agentguard/squads/**. Precedent: PR #1436 narrowed same invariant for persona.env. This is a small, well-precedented change. ageRuns=3 with no resolution.

escalations.reason: Blocker #1473 persists for 3 EM runs (threshold: 2). Status unchanged since escalation at run 2 (2026-03-31T07:37Z). Sprint features #1384/#1385 in design stall for 3 cycles — no implementation output. Recommend director review of senior/secondary agent productivity.
escalations.escalationRule: Blocker persists across 2+ runs → escalate to director. Design stall → flag for review.

escalationRules.notes: #1473 at ageRuns=3 triggers persistent blocker re-escalation. 0 CI failures. 0 governance denials this cycle.

metrics.note: PR #1469 confirmed merged (counted here as it was stale in prior state). Issue #1449 closed via merge. 0 new PRs this cycle — squad underutilizing capacity.

dogfoodObservations.description: ESCALATED (ageRuns=3): no-governance-self-modification invariant fires on Write to .agentguard/squads/kernel/state.json and em-report.json. Fix: add .agentguard/squads/** to exemptions in packages/invariants/src/definitions.ts OPERATIONAL_STATE_PATTERNS.

no-credential-file-creation false positive on grep -v (invert-match on credential keywords). Read-only operation incorrectly blocked. Fix: require write operation + credential content, not keyword presence alone.
Default telemetry URL 'telemetry.agentguard.dev' is unreachable (HTTPS fails silently). All new users without .env lose telemetry events. Assigned to senior this cycle.
0 governance denials this EM run cycle. All governed operations clean.

testHealth.note: Stable. No kernel/invariant changes since QA baseline 2026-03-30T18:52Z. Run pnpm test to verify before any new PRs.

Director: review escalation for #1473 (ageRuns=3). Assign kernel senior to narrow OPERATIONAL_STATE_PATTERNS in packages/invariants/src/definitions.ts. All EM agents are affected.

Secondary agent: begin implementation on #1384 — start with browser.* action types in packages/core/src/actions.ts and stub invariant definitions in packages/invariants/src/definitions.ts. End design stall.

Tertiary: begin prototype on #1385 — add irreversible property to ActionContext (packages/core/src/types.ts), detection hook in packages/kernel/src/decision.ts. PauseRequested/PauseResolved schema ready.
